query:
-- Fix S0883 revenue to $135.69 (24-month item only)
UPDATE services SET monthlyRevenue = 135.69 WHERE externalId = 'S0883';

-- S0884 revenue is already correct at $128.79 (36-month item only) - verify
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost,
  ROUND(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost, 2) as margin,
  ROUND((monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost) / monthlyRevenue * 100, 1) as marginPct
FROM services
WHERE externalId IN ('S0883', 'S0884', 'S0883B')
ORDER BY externalId;
